headline: Review & Preview: All Good Now
summary: REVIEW PREVIEW NEWSLETTER A Software Revival. For long stretches of the last decade, tech stocks drove much of the market’s gains. The AI boom supercharged that trend, until it didn’t. Early in 2026, in fact, tech was the market’s kryptonite, with once-hot software companies largely to blame for the trouble.

headline: Salesforce Restructures As AI Hiring Drive And Partnerships Test Valuation
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is restructuring its organization, including workforce reductions and leadership changes, while launching a program to hire 1,000 new graduates into AI focused roles. The company is expanding its AI ecosystem bets, including an early investment in Anthropic ahead of a potential $1 trillion IPO. Salesforce is deepening its partnership with Google Cloud to power enterprise AI agents and strengthen its position as an AI centered workflow platform. For investors watching...
